items.name: Ultra Heavy Flak Jacket Armor (Desert Tan)
items.description:
High durability NERA plates rated for repeated strikes, Treated Hyper-Ballistic-Aramid Textiles, all woven and forged into a 127lb "Flak jacket" that can probably catch a whole lot more than just shrapnel.. That being you can even stand with it on..

This one's a tan / desert-y color; A fine subtle choice between heat-exposure or shrapnel-exposure.
Frankly I wouldn't want to wear anything heavier than 20lbs out in the heat even if it was armor

Made By Lulzisback33

tags lol: ballistic vest body armor tactical plate carrier eod juggernaut bomb suit sand sandy arid dry camo
